testcase.name: parses MouseMoveRel

failure.message: value of: readNext() expected: MouseMoveRel(dx=5, dy=-3) but was : MouseMoveRel(dx=5, dy=253)

testcase.failure: value of: readNext() expected: MouseMoveRel(dx=5, dy=-3) but was : MouseMoveRel(dx=5, dy=253) at app//com.inputleaf.android.protocol.ProtocolParserTest.parses MouseMoveRel(ProtocolParserTest.kt:46)

testcase.name: parses KeyDown message
